data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the prerequisite checking requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a consultation must be completed before booking a surgery. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this specific requirement, leading to an inconclusive status. The linked use case mentions the need for prerequisite checking but lacks concrete evidence that this requirement is being satisfied or checked.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the prerequisite checking (consultation completion) is validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the consultation completion requirement.
